item.description: Eastern Refinery Limited, the lone state-owned oil refinery in the country, resumed crude oil processing on Friday after remaining shut for nearly a month, following the arrival of a vessel carrying 1 lakh tonnes of crude from Saudi Arabia at Chattogram Port....

item.description: The prices of key essentials, including chicken, eggs, rice, sugar, and vegetables, remained high in Dhaka’s kitchen markets on Friday, alongside an ongoing shortage of edible oil....

item.description: Despite exceeding the target for Boro cultivation this season, farmers in Gazipur now face an uncertain future due to continuous rainfall, hailstorms and waterlogging in the final stage of the season....

item.description: A woman gave birth to seven babies after 10 years of marriage in Narail Sadar upazila, but none of the newborns survived due to premature birth, leaving the family and locals devastated....

item.description: Bangladesh has called for stronger global cooperation to curb irregular migration, protect migrant rights and ensure fair recruitment, decent work and equitable wages for migrant workers worldwide....
